roles.title: Role Bottom Nav
roles.description: Pick the four destinations that appear on the phone bottom tab bar for each role. Empty selection falls back to the portal defaults.
roles.customizeSheetDescription: Pick up to 4 destinations to promote to the phone bottom tab bar. Slugs the user lacks ability for are silently skipped.
roles.skippedNote: Slugs the user does not have permission for are silently skipped at runtime.
roles.saveFailed: Could not save bottom nav. Please try again.
roles.forbiddenDescription: Only institute admins can customize role bottom nav. Ask your administrator if you need a change.
roles.loadFailedDescription: Something went wrong while loading the role list. Try again in a moment.
roles.emptyDescription: Roles appear here as soon as they are seeded for your institute.

preview.label: Preview
preview.empty: Uses portal default — dashboard, students, enquiries, academics
